narrative:
DOMINANT DRIVERS

1. USD weakness because DXY CSM sits at 26 on D1 while USD proxy reads -0.33, confirming broad dollar selling pressure across all timeframes
2. AUD and GBP outperformance because CSM ranks AUD at 100 and GBP at 93 on D1, with AUDUSD and NZDUSD carrying the strongest H4 buy signals at +4 and +3 respectively
3. JPY crosses unwinding because EURJPY, GBPJPY, CADJPY, and NZDJPY all show H4 sell signals between -3 and -4, driven by USDJPY weakness rather than yen safe-haven demand in a risk-on environment

PRICE CONFIRMS

AUDUSD and NZDUSD are leading the risk-on move with their 0.94 correlation acting as mutual confirmation, and both pairs are printing buy signals while AUD tops the D1 CSM ranking. EURJPY and CADJPY carrying identical -4 H4 sell signals and a 0.97 correlation confirms the JPY cross weakness is systematic rather than idiosyncratic. USDCHF adds further confirmation with a D1 sell signal and negative correlations to both NZDUSD and EURUSD, reinforcing the broad USD-down structure.

REGIME

Risk-On confirmed. VIX at 17 is elevated but S&P 500 is pushing to 7230 with a 0.29 percent gain, Gold at 4644 rising alongside equities reflects dollar debasement rather than fear, and copper up 1 percent anchors the commodity-led risk-on read.

CONTRADICTIONS

1. EUR CSM divergence: EUR is the weakest D1 currency at 0 yet accelerates to 100 on H4, creating a short-term signal against the dominant D1 trend that risks fading quickly
2. VIX rising while equities gain: VIX up 0.59 percent alongside S&P 500 gains introduces mild hedging flow that slightly dilutes the clean risk-on read

TRADE IMPLICATIONS

Best: AUDUSD up - AUD strongest CSM, USD weakest, H4 buy signal, commodity tailwind - Conviction 8/10
Secondary: USDCAD down - CAD CSM at 51 versus USD at 26, negative correlation confirmed, oil softness is the only drag - Conviction 6/10
Avoid: EURUSD - EUR D1 versus H4 CSM divergence creates conflicted directional signal
Watch: AUDUSD breaking and holding above the current H4 resistance would confirm AUD momentum is extending beyond short-term technicals and validate the primary trade
key_observation: Broad-based commodity strength across agricultural complex (corn, wheat, soybeans, cotton, sugar, cocoa, coffee) with explicit dollar weakness noted in coffee headline. Equity record highs support risk-on environment. Crude weakness from US-Iran negotiation hopes is offsetting factor but outweighed by commodity bull case.
watch: USD weakness persistence and whether equity strength can sustain without supporting dollar. Monitor crude stabilization and geopolitical developments. Coffee positioning unwinding suggests leveraged positioning adjustments underway.
